sigWerErrors.reason: Changing '不用了' (no need) to '不要了' (don't want) slightly alters the nuance but the overall intent of declining remains similar.
Changing '记录' (record) to '进入' (enter) significantly changes the meaning of the sentence, as it shifts from not needing to record the email to not needing to enter the email.
Replacing '我这个邮箱' (this email of mine) with '我的邮箱' (my email) is a minor difference in specificity, but the meaning is essentially the same.
Omitting '个' in '我这个邮箱' (this email of mine) to '我的邮箱' (my email) is a minor grammatical difference and does not affect the overall meaning.
